general.title: General Settings
general.description: Here you'll find basic settings like language, appearance, and device name.

deviceName.title: Device Name
deviceName.description: Give this device a name. This helps you track which changes came from which device.

extensionsNav.title: Extensions
extensionsNav.description: Here you manage installed extensions and discover new ones in the Marketplace.

extensions.title: Marketplace
extensions.description: Open the Marketplace to install extensions like haex-pass for passwords or haex-notes for notes.

identitiesNav.title: Identities
identitiesNav.description: Here you manage your cryptographic identities for encrypted synchronization.

identity.title: Create Identity
identity.description: Create your first identity. It's required for the end-to-end encrypted connection with a sync server.

syncNav.title: Sync
syncNav.description: Here you configure the connection to a sync server to use your vault across multiple devices.

sync.title: Add Backend
sync.description: Connect a sync server to synchronize your vault across devices.
